action.reasoning: Observation: I have a working model that achieved 14.95% accuracy on the QuickDraw test set, which is reasonable for this domain generalization task. The model uses ResNet-50 with basic data augmentation. Analysis: To improve performance, I should implement domain generalization techniques. The current model doesn't use the domain adversarial component I included in the model definition. I should enhance the training to include domain adversarial training using gradient reversal. This involves modifying the training loop to also train on domain labels and use the gradient reversal layer. Decision: I'll update the training script to use domain adversarial training and also try a different backbone (ViT-B/16) which might perform better on this task.
